title: Gooey Citrus Mediterranean Crumble
description: A citrusy and gooey mediterranean dish with turmeric powder, smoke flavor, perfect for a brunch mood, vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Squeeze the citrus into a bowl and mix in turmeric powder, smoke flavoring, vanilla extract, and pumpkin pie spice if using.
Melt vegetable shortening or coconut oil in another bowl. Mix it with white sugar until well combined.
Gradually add the melted mixture to the citrus mixture while stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Transfer the mixture into a greased baking dish. Spread evenly.
Mix flour and sprinkle over the top of the spread mixture. Press gently with fingers or spatula.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and set.
